creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:

Author: riggs

Log:
  - Assign maintainership to Carlos Jacobo Puga Medina <cpm@fbsd.es>
  - Add RESTRICTED, LICENSE
  - Clean up Makefile
    - Retire post-install
    - Use pkg-message
  - Rename patches according to the naming conventions

  Reviewed by:	marino, riggs
